creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
New summer afternoon tea in the Crystal Moon Lounge at Corinthia London 🌸

The tea has been redesigned around the British summer season ☀️ Highlights include pastries such as Highgrove honey puff pastry, dark chocolate and salted caramel choux, and apricot Bakewell tart ✨

The experience is set against a stunning floral installation by FLOWERBX, and it runs through to the end of August 📆

📍 Corinthia Hotel, 10 Whitehall Pl, SW1A 2BD @corinthialondon with @londoncoffeeshops😊
